description_long: This is a large, modern commercial jet airplane with a sleek, dark blue fuselage and swept-back wings. The aircraft features two turbofan engines mounted at the rear of the fuselage, just ahead of a prominent T-tail configuration. The wings are low-mounted with slight dihedral angles and orange-tipped wingtips, and the landing gear is extended, showing a tricycle arrangement. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility for pilots. The airplane has detailed markings, including registration numbers and airline insignia, and the surface appears smooth and metallic. The overall design suggests a regional or short-haul jetliner, suitable for passenger transport.
description: A sleek, dark blue commercial jet with rear-mounted engines, swept low wings, and a T-tail, featuring detailed markings and a smooth metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and the full span of the left wing with orange-tipped wingtips.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the twin rear-mounted engines, T-tail, and the extended landing gear beneath the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the right wing, engine placement, and the tail's structure with visible dihedral angle.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the cockpit, right wing, and the detailed airline markings along the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with slight dihedral angle and orange-tipped wingtips; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted turbofan engines on either side of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
